creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
On Fri, Jul 23, 1999 at 03:58:14PM -0500, Ade Lovett wrote:
> 
> >Number:         12781
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       GNOME port updates
>
> [snip]

Please hold off on this PR for a few days.

	gnome-core-1.0.8
	gnome-pim-1.0.9
and	gnome-libs-1.0.12

have just been released (I love rapidly moving targets :)

I'll do the necessary updates, put up a new tarball in the same
location, and submit another followup to this PR when they're
ready.

Thanks,
	-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
